classification.task_goal: Generate various written assignments and notifications for students regarding disciplinary actions.
primary_constraints: The essay must be tedious and lengthy enough to occupy at least an hour of the pupil's free time.
The detention notice must specify the date, time, and conditions of the detention.
The discipline assignment must include instructions to work on homework after completion.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially generated responses that did not fully meet the user's constraints regarding length and tedium. However, the user provided corrective feedback, which the AI addressed in subsequent responses, thus enforcing the constraints afterward.
